w:r.w:t: A Poster combines text and graphics to make a presentation that communicates your research. It advertises your research in a catchy and
Typically, a professional poster involves showing your work to numerous researchers at a conference or seminar.
As the viewers walk by, your poster should quickly and efficiently communicate your research.
After successful registration, participants submit their poster on the Google form provided on the website before the event's due deadline. All such posters received
will be intimated to present a respective measurement (on

the time of registration on the website.
WhatsApp prior to 3 days before the event.
